== Notes for [[Item:Q60192|Q60192]] ==

* [http://www.mechon-mamre.org/p/pt/pt25a03.htm#19 1 Chronicles 3:19.]

4th Exilarch.

Also mentioned in Abarbanel family scroll – undated handwritten manuscript from the collection of the late Rabbi Shmuel Gorr, held by Chaim Freedman.

Reference was made to “Elef Margaliot” 1993, Meir Wunder.

http://www.biblesearchers.com/yahshua/davidian/dynasty9.shtml

2 Kin 22:3; 1 Chr 3:19

541 Scribe of Josiah house.

1 Chr 3:20

Neh 3:10; 9:5

1 Chr 3:20

1 Chr 3:20

2 Kin 22:3; 1 Chr 3:19

541 Scribe of Josiah house.

Neh 3:10; 9:5

1 Chr 3:20

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
